message:
feat: implement autopilot persistent completion system (ADR-072)

Phase 1-3 of ADR-072: CLI command, MCP tools, and stop hook check.

CLI command (10 subcommands):
- status, enable, disable, config, reset, log, learn, history, predict, check

MCP tools (10 tools):
- autopilot_status, autopilot_enable, autopilot_disable, autopilot_config,
  autopilot_reset, autopilot_log, autopilot_progress, autopilot_learn,
  autopilot_history, autopilot_predict

Stop hook check (autopilotCheck):
- 3-source task discovery (team-tasks, swarm-tasks, file-checklist)
- Re-engagement prompt builder with stall detection
- Safety limits: max iterations (50), timeout (4hr), stall auto-disable (10)
- Reward calculation for completion episodes
- Graceful degradation when AgentDB not available

Closes #1439

Co-Authored-By: claude-flow <ruv@ruv.net>
